> **KNOWN ISSUE**: this report is biased by the same coordinator
> heredoc bug that affected pass-5 memcache (see
> `docs/journal/2026-05-26-mode-leak-bug.md`).  Floki's chaos
> bounces continuously cycled the redis backing store; combined
> with arnold + nuc start failures, only meh produced clean riak
> traffic (138,844 ok / 20,666 fail = 87% on meh).  Aggregate
> 14% success is dominated by floki's broken state.  Pass-6 will
> re-run with the heredoc fix.
